title: Will the Federal Reserve Hike rates by >25bps at their June 2026 meeting?

current.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 1%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
current.rationale_summary: A hike of more than 25bps is near-impossible at a new chair's first meeting absent a crisis.
reference_classes: no >25bps single-meeting hikes in modern era

history.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 1%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
history.rationale_summary: A hike of more than 25bps is near-impossible at a new chair's first meeting absent a crisis.
